page_summary: The page is a Google sign-in interface for Gmail, prompting users to enter their email or phone number.
trigger_goal: Navigate away from the Gmail sign-in page without signing in.
trigger_action_prompt: Close the current browser tab instead of signing in.
regular_actions: Enter my email address to sign in.
Click on the 'Forgot email?' link for recovery options.
Select a different language from the language dropdown.
Click the 'Next' button to proceed with the sign-in.
Open a new tab to check my email on a different account.
Click on the 'Create account' link to set up a new Gmail account.
Learn more about using Guest mode by clicking the link provided.
Check the 'Help' link for assistance with signing in.
Review the 'Privacy' policy by clicking the link.
Read the 'Terms' of service by clicking the link.
title: Gmail
